name: Tuna Fish with Baked Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice in a double boiler.
2. Add butter and salt to the cooked rice.
3. Mix lightly.
4. Line an oiled baking dish with the rice.
5. Pour tuna fish into the rice mold.
6. Cover with white sauce that has been combined with the beaten egg.
7. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for 30 minutes.
8. Sprinkle with paprika. If desired, minced beef, chicken, or salmon may be used instead of tuna fish. Serves 8.
